reasoning: A well-constructed CBC padding oracle with a genuinely subtle timestamp-precision side channel (microsecond vs millisecond) rather than distinct error codes, plus a 20-bit PoW tied to request data preventing replay/pre-computation and a constant-time delay floor. Flag isolation is excellent (init_crypto.py encrypts at build, chmod 0400, ctfuser separation). Comparable in quality to previous 7/10 benchmarks — the oracle subtlety and heavy PoW gate elevate it, though the underlying attack pattern (CBC padding oracle) remains a well-known technique for this difficulty tier.
